summary: Iteration 6 - Tested multi-step enrollment and payment system with India-gating. All 23 backend tests passed after fixing a NoneType bug in pricing endpoint. Frontend 4-step enrollment flow working correctly: Profile → Attendance → Contact Verification → Payment.

fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'startswith' when phone is None
fixed.fix: Changed phone = enrollment.get('phone', '') to phone = enrollment.get('phone') or '' and added null check for startswith

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - country code select has hydration issue with spans inside options

critical_code_review_comments: Enrollment flow properly implements 4-step process: Profile → Attendance → Contact → Payment
VPN detection using ip-api.com working - preview server correctly detected as US/hosting
Email validation includes format check, MX record lookup, and disposable email rejection
Phone OTP is MOCKED - returns otp in response and displays on frontend for testing
India-gating logic checks: IP is India, claimed country is India, no VPN, phone is +91
BIN validation checks card against known Indian bank prefixes and binlist.net API
Pricing correctly defaults to AED when any India check fails
seed_data_creation: Used existing program ID 1 (Atomic Weight Release Program)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enrollment API fully tested. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_enrollment.py. Phone OTP is MOCKED - the mock_otp is returned in send-otp response and displayed on frontend. VPN is always detected in preview environment (IP detected as US/hosting), so pricing defaults to AED. All 4 enrollment steps work: 1) Profile form 2) Attendance (online/offline with modal) 3) Contact verification (email MX check + phone OTP) 4) Billing with security checks.

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response, displayed on frontend for testing

backend_api.POST /api/enrollment/start: PASS - Creates enrollment with IP detection, VPN check
backend_api.PUT /api/enrollment/{id}/attendance: PASS - Sets online/offline mode, returns venue info for offline
backend_api.POST /api/enrollment/{id}/validate-email: PASS - Format check, MX record check, disposable email rejection
backend_api.POST /api/enrollment/{id}/send-otp: PASS - Sends mock OTP, returns mock_otp in response
backend_api.POST /api/enrollment/{id}/verify-otp: PASS - Verifies OTP, rejects wrong OTP with attempt tracking
backend_api.GET /api/enrollment/{id}/pricing: PASS - Returns pricing with security checks, AED when VPN detected
backend_api.POST /api/enrollment/{id}/validate-bin: PASS - Validates card BIN against India

frontend_ui.step_indicator: PASS - 4-step indicator showing Profile, Attendance, Verify, Payment
frontend_ui.step_1_profile: PASS - Name, age, gender, relationship, country form fields
frontend_ui.step_2_attendance: PASS - Online/Offline buttons, offline modal with venue info
frontend_ui.step_3_contact: PASS - Email validation, phone OTP with mock OTP display
frontend_ui.step_4_billing: PASS - Pricing display, security warnings, Pay Now button
frontend_ui.vpn_warning: PASS - Shows VPN/Proxy Detected banner when detected
frontend_ui.fraud_warning: PASS - Shows INR pricing unavailable message with reasons
